tasks.prompt:
Summarize the incident using exactly three bullet points labeled Trigger, Fix, and Outcome:

A news website stopped loading images after an expired access credential blocked its storage service. Engineers replaced the credential and restarted the image proxy. Images became available again, and an automated expiration alert was configured.

result.text:
• Trigger: An expired access credential blocked the news website's storage service, causing images to stop loading.

• Fix: Engineers replaced the expired credential and restarted the image proxy to restore storage service connectivity.

• Outcome: Images became available again, and an automated expiration alert was configured to prevent future recurrence.
